markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between ProcurePro and fwd.digital for content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation services with human oversight, producing 50,000+ words/month at $0.10-0.20/word](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [ProcurePro (50 employees, $6M AUD ARR) seeks to scale content production for organic growth in construction tech](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [fwd.digital's process combines AI research/writing with human editors, custom workflows, and strategic guidance](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Engagement starts at $9,000/month with a 90-day initial period; next availability is February 10th](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

## Topics

### ProcurePro Background

  - [50-person company with $6M AUD ARR ($4.5M USD)](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Targeting general contractors in Australia, UK, and Ireland](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Expanding globally, but product not yet fully adapted for US market](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Strong product-market fit and customer satisfaction in current markets](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-powered research agents to understand client's business and target personas](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Generates content ideas, outlines, and drafts using custom AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Human editors oversee process, ensure quality, and adapt content to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Offers both editorial content (lower volume, more bespoke) and programmatic SEO (higher volume, templated)](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Can produce 50,000+ words per month, with costs ranging from $0.10-0.20 per word](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Service Structure and Capacity

  - [Team organized into pods, each handling 3-4 client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Each pod includes managing editor, SEO specialists, copy editors, writers, and virtual assistants](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Currently at capacity with \~30 clients, booking new clients for February 10th start date](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [90-day initial engagement period, then ongoing monthly service](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focuses on understanding buyer personas and pain points beyond just keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Aims to create a broad base of content, then optimize based on performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Encourages rapid content production with later refinement, rather than perfecting each piece](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

### ProcurePro's Content Needs

  - [Large backlog of content ideas across various topics (products, founder journey, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Plans for an "evergreen" procurement playbook resource](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Creating a new category in construction tech, requiring unique industry insights](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send meeting recording, sample SOW, and add Alastair to Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Alastair to share information with ProcurePro's marketing team for internal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [ProcurePro to consider timeline and budget for potential engagement, given February 10th availability](https://fathom.video/share/_L9cG-DqwdqkCAQVk1NX_kDvKzPvkevt?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
